_note: SLOs over the framework's OWN telemetry streams (agent-pipeline reliability, not a product service). Each targets a real docs/audits/*.jsonl stream; compute-slos.mjs gracefully reports a stream as absent until telemetry accrues, so these activate as the pipeline runs.

slos.name: Andon halt budget
slos.rationale: Pipeline andon-halts should be rare. A spike means the gates are tripping systemically — investigate before continuing waves.

slos.name: Quality-gate trip budget
slos.rationale: Gates blocking work is healthy in moderation; a high trip rate signals upstream quality erosion (spec or implementation).

slos.name: Security finding budget (zero-tolerance)
slos.rationale: Any high/critical security finding reaching telemetry is a budget breach — the security gate should have blocked it earlier.
